# ErrorRegistry.ReservedErrorCodes property

The reserved codes an extension-defined code MUST NOT collide with: the five standard JSON-RPC codes, the two protocol-specific codes, and the `-32001` HeaderMismatch transport code (R-22.7-c, AC-34.23).

```csharp
public static IReadOnlyList<int> ReservedErrorCodes { get; }
```
